title: Smoky Herring Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew originating from coastal East Africa, featuring smoky flavors and a silky texture.

ingredients.name: herring
ingredients.notes: look for herring in water or olive oil

ingredients.name: silky
ingredients.notes: adds a hint of sweetness and silkiness

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Sauté the chopped onion until softened.
Add the smoked paprika and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chicken broth, herring, salt, and pepper.
Bring the stew to a boil, then reduce the heat and simmer for 10 minutes.
Stir in the honey until dissolved.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
Serve with crusty bread or over rice, if desired.
